purpose: Targeted follow-up for the two unavailable modified-NanoAOD counterparts in raw_pseudodata_provenance_v2.json.

search_scope.rule: Only the full-payload-resolved modified-H4l source files and their documented production inputs were examined. No event was substituted.
search_scope.modified_raw_replica_result: No alternate basename or replica was found in the owner production tree. Each UUID has exactly one nanoaod_modified path, the unavailable path already recorded in the v2 scan.

unavailable_modified_raw_files.failure_message: SysError in <TFile::Flush>: error flushing file ..._scale_smear.root No such device
SysError in <TFile::Flush>: error flushing file ..._scale_smear.root No such device

original_raw_is_not_a_substitute.reason: The fake-data rows came from the scale/smear-modified H4l chain, while the documented available originals are the pre-response NanoAOD inputs.

modified_vs_nominal_h4l_comparison.all_five_rows: At minimum, mZ1, mZ2, m4l, pt4l, eta4l, phi4l, y4l, and the pT/eta/phi values of all four selected leptons differ.

row_1_927325_231831246.additional_changed_content: Selected-lepton charge, PDG ID, impact-parameter, and isolation quantities also differ.

original_raw_is_not_a_substitute.conclusion: Even though the originals contain the event IDs and object schema, using them would mix pre-response raw objects with response-modified fake H4l values. It is not an event-faithful replacement.

disposition.full_pseudodata_vbf_fsr_validation: Blocked pending repair/regeneration of the two modified-NanoAOD files and a repeat exact-coverage check.
disposition.subset_of_647: May be used only as a clearly labelled engineering diagnostic after an explicit owner decision. It is not a complete pseudo-data validation or a physics result: the missing 0.77% is process-specific and cannot be silently dropped.
disposition.recommended_non_destructive_fix: Re-run the documented nanoaod_response tasks from the two original NanoAOD inputs to new, validated output paths; then rebuild the modified H4l/fake-data provenance map or prove event-level compatibility before replacing any production artifact.
